title: Vikrant Patil
text:
I have over 22 years of experience in software development across a range of computational fields — from Computational Fluid Dynamics and bioinformatics algorithms to network-based license servers and Python programming. I have received a M.Tech in Computational Science from the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore and B.E (Mechanical Engineering) from College of Engineering, Pune.
I’ve worked at Strand Life Sciences, DRDO, and Mahindra, and consulted for Prayas Energy Group and S&I Engineering Solutions. I’m a lead contributor to Rumi, an open-source energy modelling platform by Prayas.
I also run corporate Python programming trainings through Pipal Academy, and have delivered workshops at organisations including DRDO, Arcesium, VMware, and Blinkit. The full archive is on the Trainings page.
My main interests are mathematics, mathematical algorithms, open-source tooling and Linux, high-performance computing, and writing good programs.

Training notes

full archive of training notes, day-by-day breakdowns of the Python sessions linked from the Trainings page.

title: Welcome
text:
Welcome to my corner of the internet.
This site is where I’ll be collecting notes on Python, training material, and the occasional writeup on things I’m working on. The Trainings page has the running archive of sessions I’ve delivered going back to 2017; everything else here is new.
More to come.

title: Talks & Projects
text:
Lead contributor to Rumi, an open-source energy modelling platform developed by the Prayas Energy Group.



xlwb This project aims at creating automation tool for updating predefined website from a excel sheet



ragabot is simple tool which makes use of markov chains to learn from given notations of indian classical raaga and generates a tune in same raaga.
